DynamicAgentSpec.description: A brand-new agent spec generated by the Planner for novel security surfaces.

name.description: Short display name for this agent (e.g. 'GraphQL Injection Auditor')
name.title: Name

focus.description: One-line description of what this agent checks
focus.title: Focus

system_instructions.description: Full system prompt for this agent — detailed, specific instructions for the security review it should conduct
system_instructions.title: System Instructions

tools_needed.description: Names of tools from the tool registry to give this agent. Valid values: run_semgrep_sast, detect_secrets_gitleaks, scan_dependencies_trivy
tools_needed.title: Tools Needed

trigger_reason.description: Why the orchestrator created this agent — what it detected in the StackProfile that warranted it
trigger_reason.title: Trigger Reason

DynamicAgentSpec.title: DynamicAgentSpec

description.description: Detailed explanation including the data flow from source to sink
description.title: Description

severity.description: Severity level: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW
severity.title: Severity
